tool.name: obiconvert
tool.description: converts sequence files to different output formats

param.name: input
param.label: Input sequences file
param.help: database used for the in silico PCR.

tool.help:
.. class:: infomark
**What it does**
obiconvert converts sequence files to different output formats. See the documentation for more details on the different formats.
Input files can be in :
fasta format
extended OBITools fasta format
fastq format
Solexa fastq format
ecoPCR format
ecoPCR database format
GenBank format
EMBL format
obiconvert converts those files to the :
extended OBITools fasta format
fastq format
ecoPCR database format
If no file name is specified, data is read from standard input.
@OBITOOLS4_IMAGE@
@OBITOOLS_LINK_OBI4@
